stage: TRACKER-0 INLINE PROJECT TRACKER RESEARCH AND DESIGN LOCK

blocked_assumptions: Do not assume a persistent custom UI widget can be injected into all future responses.
Do not assume canvas is available on Android/mobile as an enforcement surface.
Do not assume chat memory is authoritative state.

percent_allowed_only_when: stage ledger or checklist provides denominator

governance_constraints.boot_gate: No governed project action until tracker state is loaded or a blocked tracker is rendered.
governance_constraints.render_gate: Every governed project response must start with the tracker block.
governance_constraints.progress_gate: No percentage or filled bar unless denominator is known.
governance_constraints.stop_gate: One bounded stage per turn unless user explicitly changes scope.
